title: Fix message pagination: load newest 100 not oldest
description: message_query with ascending sort + position:0,limit:100 loads the OLDEST 100 messages. For chats >100 messages, stick_to_bottom(true) scrolls to message 100 which is not the most recent. Fix: sort descending in message_query so position:0,limit:100 returns the 100 newest IDs; sort ascending in load_messages_for_chat for chronological display.
close_reason: Fixed: sort descending in methods.rs message_query; sort ascending in client_task.rs load_messages_for_chat after fetch. All 89 tests pass.
